title: Grand Pacific Glacier at Tarr Inlet
description: Aerial view showing the muddy, debris-covered terminus of Grand Pacific Glacier reaching Tarr Inlet at the head of Glacier Bay. Turquoise glacial meltwater in the foreground, dark glacial moraine across the bay.
alt: Aerial image of the debris-covered Grand Pacific Glacier reaching Tarr Inlet in Glacier Bay
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-11 — downloaded from nps.gov Grand Pacific Glacier place page, visually confirmed
